{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Grass Peaks eagle-hound
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Grass Peaks eagle-hounds are animals assigned to [[Eternity headquarters]] guards.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“I know that there are eight guards, each with a Grass Peaks eagle-hound, and their shifts change twice per night.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
